---
title: "Lab 2: HTML Forms & Multimedia"
date: "2026-02-03"
due: "2026-02-11"
---

# Lab 2: HTML Forms & Multimedia {.page-break-before}

In this lab, you'll create multi-page websites with forms, images, and multimedia content.

## Lab Objectives {.objectives}

By the end of this lab, you will be able to:

::: {.objectives-list}
- ✓ Create semantic multi-page websites
- ✓ Build and style HTML forms
- ✓ Embed images, audio, and video
- ✓ Create navigation menus
- ✓ Implement form validation
- ✓ Optimize multimedia content
:::

## Pre-Lab Requirements

::: {.callout-note}
Before starting this lab, make sure you have:

- VS Code installed with extensions from Lab 1
- Basic understanding of HTML structure
- Project folder from Lab 1 ready
- Images or multimedia files to use
:::

---

## Part 1: Create Multi-Page Website Structure

### Step 1: Create Lab 2 Folder

In your `BMC201-WebTech/Labs/` folder:
1. Create a new folder: `Lab02`
2. Inside Lab02, create these files:
   - `index.html` (Home page)
   - `about.html` (About page)
   - `contact.html` (Contact page)
   - `style.css` (Styling)

3. Create these folders:
   - `images/` (for images)
   - `media/` (for audio/video)

**Final structure:**
```
Lab02/
├── index.html
├── about.html
├── contact.html
├── style.css
├── images/
└── media/
```

### Step 2: Create Navigation Component

Each page will have the same navigation. Create this in all pages:

```html
<nav>
    <ul>
        <li><a href="index.html">Home</a></li>
        <li><a href="about.html">About</a></li>
        <li><a href="contact.html">Contact</a></li>
    </ul>
</nav>
```

---

## Part 2: Home Page (index.html)

### Complete Home Page Example

```html
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>My Portfolio - Home</title>
    <link rel="stylesheet" href="style.css">
</head>
<body>
    <!-- Navigation -->
    <nav class="navbar">
        <ul>
            <li><a href="index.html">Home</a></li>
            <li><a href="about.html">About</a></li>
            <li><a href="contact.html">Contact</a></li>
        </ul>
    </nav>

    <!-- Header -->
    <header class="hero">
        <h1>Welcome to My Portfolio</h1>
        <p>Web Developer & Designer</p>
    </header>

    <!-- Main Content -->
    <main>
        <section class="about-preview">
            <h2>About Me</h2>
            <p>I'm a student learning web development at GCET.</p>
            <a href="about.html" class="button">Learn More</a>
        </section>

        <section class="skills">
            <h2>My Skills</h2>
            <ul>
                <li>HTML5</li>
                <li>CSS3</li>
                <li>JavaScript</li>
                <li>Responsive Design</li>
            </ul>
        </section>
    </main>

    <!-- Footer -->
    <footer>
        <p>&copy; 2026 [Your Name]. All rights reserved.</p>
    </footer>
</body>
</html>
```

---

## Part 3: About Page (about.html)

### About Page with Images and Lists

```html
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>About Me - Portfolio</title>
    <link rel="stylesheet" href="style.css">
</head>
<body>
    <!-- Navigation (same on all pages) -->
    <nav class="navbar">
        <ul>
            <li><a href="index.html">Home</a></li>
            <li><a href="about.html" class="active">About</a></li>
            <li><a href="contact.html">Contact</a></li>
        </ul>
    </nav>

    <main>
        <h1>About Me</h1>

        <!-- Profile Section -->
        <section class="profile">
            <img src="images/profile.jpg" alt="My Profile Photo" 
                 width="200" style="max-width: 100%; height: auto;">
            <h2>[Your Name]</h2>
            <p>Passionate web developer learning modern technologies.</p>
        </section>

        <!-- Education Section -->
        <section class="education">
            <h2>Education</h2>
            <ul>
                <li>
                    <strong>MCA</strong> - Galgotias College of Engineering & Technology
                    <p>2025 - Present</p>
                </li>
                <li>
                    <strong>B.Tech</strong> - [Your Engineering Branch]
                    <p>Graduation Year</p>
                </li>
            </ul>
        </section>

        <!-- Experience Section -->
        <section class="experience">
            <h2>Experience</h2>
            <h3>Intern at [Company Name]</h3>
            <p>Duration: Jan 2025 - Present</p>
            <p>Worked on web development projects using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript.</p>
        </section>
    </main>

    <footer>
        <p>&copy; 2026 [Your Name]. All rights reserved.</p>
    </footer>
</body>
</html>
```

---

## Part 4: Contact Page with Form (contact.html)

### Contact Form with HTML5 Validation

```html
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>Contact Me - Portfolio</title>
    <link rel="stylesheet" href="style.css">
</head>
<body>
    <!-- Navigation -->
    <nav class="navbar">
        <ul>
            <li><a href="index.html">Home</a></li>
            <li><a href="about.html">About</a></li>
            <li><a href="contact.html" class="active">Contact</a></li>
        </ul>
    </nav>

    <main>
        <h1>Get In Touch</h1>
        <p>Have a question? Fill out the form below and I'll get back to you!</p>

        <!-- Contact Form -->
        <form class="contact-form" action="mailto:your-email@example.com" method="POST">
            
            <!-- Name Field -->
            <div class="form-group">
                <label for="name">Full Name *</label>
                <input type="text" id="name" name="name" required 
                       placeholder="Enter your full name">
            </div>

            <!-- Email Field -->
            <div class="form-group">
                <label for="email">Email Address *</label>
                <input type="email" id="email" name="email" required 
                       placeholder="Enter your email">
            </div>

            <!-- Phone Field -->
            <div class="form-group">
                <label for="phone">Phone Number</label>
                <input type="tel" id="phone" name="phone" 
                       placeholder="Enter your phone number">
            </div>

            <!-- Subject Field -->
            <div class="form-group">
                <label for="subject">Subject *</label>
                <select id="subject" name="subject" required>
                    <option value="">-- Select Subject --</option>
                    <option value="general">General Inquiry</option>
                    <option value="job">Job Opportunity</option>
                    <option value="collaboration">Collaboration</option>
                    <option value="feedback">Feedback</option>
                </select>
            </div>

            <!-- Message Field -->
            <div class="form-group">
                <label for="message">Message *</label>
                <textarea id="message" name="message" required 
                          rows="6" placeholder="Enter your message"></textarea>
            </div>

            <!-- Checkbox -->
            <div class="form-group">
                <input type="checkbox" id="agree" name="agree" required>
                <label for="agree">I agree to be contacted</label>
            </div>

            <!-- Buttons -->
            <div class="form-buttons">
                <button type="submit" class="btn-primary">Send Message</button>
                <button type="reset" class="btn-secondary">Clear Form</button>
            </div>
        </form>

        <!-- Contact Info -->
        <section class="contact-info">
            <h2>Other Ways to Connect</h2>
            <ul>
                <li>Email: <a href="mailto:your-email@example.com">your-email@example.com</a></li>
                <li>Phone: <a href="tel:+919876543210">+91-9876-543-210</a></li>
                <li>LinkedIn: <a href="https://linkedin.com" target="_blank">My LinkedIn</a></li>
            </ul>
        </section>
    </main>

    <footer>
        <p>&copy; 2026 [Your Name]. All rights reserved.</p>
    </footer>
</body>
</html>
```

---

## Part 5: Create Basic CSS Styling

### Create style.css

```css
/* General Styles */
* {
    margin: 0;
    padding: 0;
    box-sizing: border-box;
}

body {
    font-family: Arial, sans-serif;
    line-height: 1.6;
    color: #333;
    background-color: #f4f4f4;
}

main {
    max-width: 1200px;
    margin: 20px auto;
    padding: 20px;
    background-color: white;
    border-radius: 8px;
    box-shadow: 0 2px 5px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1);
}

/* Navigation Styles */
.navbar {
    background-color: #333;
    padding: 1rem;
    position: sticky;
    top: 0;
}

.navbar ul {
    list-style: none;
    display: flex;
    justify-content: center;
    gap: 2rem;
}

.navbar a {
    color: white;
    text-decoration: none;
    padding: 0.5rem 1rem;
}

.navbar a:hover,
.navbar a.active {
    background-color: #0066cc;
    border-radius: 4px;
}

/* Form Styles */
.form-group {
    margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
}

.form-group label {
    display: block;
    margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
    font-weight: bold;
}

.form-group input,
.form-group textarea,
.form-group select {
    width: 100%;
    padding: 0.75rem;
    border: 1px solid #ddd;
    border-radius: 4px;
    font-family: Arial, sans-serif;
}

.form-group input:focus,
.form-group textarea:focus,
.form-group select:focus {
    outline: none;
    border-color: #0066cc;
    box-shadow: 0 0 5px rgba(0, 102, 204, 0.3);
}

/* Button Styles */
.form-buttons {
    display: flex;
    gap: 1rem;
    margin-top: 2rem;
}

.btn-primary,
.btn-secondary {
    padding: 0.75rem 1.5rem;
    border: none;
    border-radius: 4px;
    font-size: 1rem;
    cursor: pointer;
}

.btn-primary {
    background-color: #0066cc;
    color: white;
}

.btn-primary:hover {
    background-color: #0052a3;
}

.btn-secondary {
    background-color: #ccc;
    color: #333;
}

.btn-secondary:hover {
    background-color: #aaa;
}

/* Footer Styles */
footer {
    background-color: #333;
    color: white;
    text-align: center;
    padding: 2rem;
    margin-top: 2rem;
}

/* Responsive Design */
@media (max-width: 768px) {
    .navbar ul {
        flex-direction: column;
        gap: 0.5rem;
    }

    .form-buttons {
        flex-direction: column;
    }

    main {
        margin: 10px;
        padding: 10px;
    }
}
```

---

## Part 6: Add Multimedia Content

### Adding Images

1. Create an `images` folder in Lab02
2. Add these image files:
   - `profile.jpg` (your photo)
   - `project1.jpg` (project image)
   - `logo.png` (optional logo)

3. In HTML, reference them:
   ```html
   <img src="images/profile.jpg" alt="My Profile" 
        width="200" style="max-width: 100%; height: auto;">
   ```

### Adding Audio & Video

Add multimedia to any page:

```html
<!-- Audio -->
<audio controls width="300">
    <source src="media/sample.mp3" type="audio/mpeg">
    Your browser doesn't support HTML5 audio.
</audio>

<!-- Video -->
<video width="400" controls>
    <source src="media/sample.mp4" type="video/mp4">
    Your browser doesn't support HTML5 video.
</video>
```

::: {.callout-note}
**Finding Free Media:**
- [Pexels](https://www.pexels.com/) - Free images
- [Pixabay](https://pixabay.com/) - Free images & videos
- [Freesound](https://freesound.org/) - Free audio
:::

---

## Part 7: Lab Exercises

### Exercise 1: Personal Portfolio

Create a complete 3-page website with:

::: {.callout-success}
- ✓ Home page with introduction
- ✓ About page with education/experience  
- ✓ Contact page with functional form
- ✓ Navigation menu on all pages
- ✓ At least 2 images
- ✓ Basic CSS styling
- ✓ Form validation
:::

### Exercise 2: Multimedia Integration

Add one of these to your website:

- A photo gallery with 3+ images
- A video about your projects
- An audio clip introducing yourself
- YouTube video embed (if available)

### Exercise 3: Form Enhancement

Enhance the contact form with:

- Different input types (text, email, tel, date)
- Dropdown select menu
- Checkboxes or radio buttons
- Textarea for longer messages
- Submit and reset buttons
- HTML5 validation

---

## Part 8: Testing & Validation

### Test Your Website

::: {.lab-action}
**Checklist:**
- [ ] All links work (internal and external)
- [ ] Navigation active states work
- [ ] Form validation works (try submitting empty)
- [ ] Images load properly
- [ ] Responsive on mobile (test in browser DevTools)
- [ ] CSS styling applies correctly
:::

### Validate HTML & CSS

1. Validate HTML: [W3C HTML Validator](https://validator.w3.org/)
2. Validate CSS: [W3C CSS Validator](https://jigsaw.w3.org/css-validator/)

::: {.callout-warning}
Fix any validation errors before submitting!
:::

---

## Part 9: Submission Requirements

### Files to Submit

Create a folder: `[RollNumber]_Lab02_[YourName]/`

Include:
```
[RollNumber]_Lab02_[YourName]/
├── index.html
├── about.html
├── contact.html
├── style.css
├── images/
│   ├── profile.jpg
│   └── (other images)
├── media/
│   └── (audio/video files if added)
├── Screenshots/
│   ├── 01-home-page.png
│   ├── 02-about-page.png
│   ├── 03-contact-form.png
│   └── 04-devtools-responsive.png
├── Validation-Reports/
│   ├── html-validation.png
│   └── css-validation.png
└── README.txt
```

### README.txt Template

```
Lab 2: HTML Forms & Multimedia
================================

Student Name: [Your Full Name]
Roll Number: [Your Roll Number]
Date Completed: [MM/DD/2026]

Features Implemented:
- 3 pages with navigation
- Contact form with validation
- Images: [Number] images
- Multimedia: [Audio/Video/Both]
- Responsive design: [Yes/No]

Special Features:
[Any additional features you added]

Issues Encountered:
[Any problems and solutions]
```

### Create ZIP File

Compress into: `[RollNumber]_Lab02_[YourName].zip`

**Submit by: February 11, 2026, 11:59 PM**

---

## Grading Rubric

| Criteria | Points |
|----------|--------|
| **Multi-page structure (3+ pages)** | 15 |
| **Navigation menu (functional)** | 10 |
| **Contact form (working validation)** | 20 |
| **Images integrated properly** | 10 |
| **Multimedia (audio/video)** | 10 |
| **CSS styling applied** | 15 |
| **Responsive design** | 10 |
| **Code quality & organization** | 5 |
| **Testing & validation** | 5 |
| **Total** | **100** |

---

## Bonus Challenges

For extra credit:

::: {.challenge-section}

**Challenge 1: Advanced Form Fields**
- Add date picker for appointment
- Add file upload field
- Add color picker
- Add range slider

**Challenge 2: Advanced Styling**
- Add hover effects on buttons
- Create a sidebar menu
- Style form inputs with custom designs  
- Add CSS animations

**Challenge 3: Multimedia Gallery**
- Create an image gallery with multiple images
- Add lightbox effect (shows full image on click)
- Create carousel/slider (manual code or library)
- Optimize images for web

**Challenge 4: Accessibility**
- Add aria-labels to all form fields
- Ensure proper color contrast
- Test with keyboard navigation
- Add skip navigation link

:::

---

## Resources

- [MDN: Forms](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTML/Element/form)
- [MDN: Audio & Video](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Learn/HTML/Multimedia_and_embedding)
- [CSS Tricks: Forms](https://css-tricks.com/best-practices-for-form-design/)
- [Week 2 Content](/content/week-02.qmd)

---

## Questions & Support

- Post in course forum
- Email: [prashantkumar.nag@galgotiacollege.edu](mailto:prashantkumar.nag@galgotiacollege.edu)
- Office hours: [Schedule here]

**Good luck! 🎉**
